channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Taalas Launches Hardcore Chip With “Insane” AI Inference Performance
item.description: Taalas has launched an AI accelerator that puts the entire AI Model into silicon, delivering 1-2 orders of magnitude greater performance. Seriously.

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Friday, February 20
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: Olympian Mikaela Shiffrin Just Made A Great Point About Online Criticism
item.description: Shiffrin makes a great point about whether criticism during competitions is warranted or justified, especially given her status.

item.title: Mckenna Grace Is Inescapable, Now With A Dozen Major IP Roles By 19
item.description: We talk about Pedro Pascal being omnipresent as of late on film and TV, but he’s got nothing on Mckenna Grace.

item.title: What Makes AI Companies Worth Investing In Today
item.description: The AI investment climate has transformed. Venture capital now flows to companies with proven value, not promises. Two experts explain the new rules.

item.title: Freelancer empathy
item.description: When phone cameras got good enough, portrait photographers scolded people who took their own headshots. And when the Mac got pretty good at typesettin...

item.title: How to write a coaching/learning prompt
item.description: An AI like Claude is actually a pretty good fortune cookie. You can ask a simple question and get a simple answer, sometimes a profound one. But this ...

item.title: Misguided optimization
item.description: Industrialism brought us the idea of optimization. Incremental improvements combined with measurement to gradually improve results. We can optimize fo...

item.title: Mysterious predictability
item.description: A watched pot will boil. As it heats up, there’s no way to predict where the cavitation will start and which bubble will arrive first. But with enough...

item.title: Better vs. done
item.description: “There, it’s done.” This is the production mindset and the rule of school. Pencils down. Hand it in. The alternative is, “Sign me up for a commitment ...
